title: 5-in-1 Robot Building Kit with LED Light, APP & Remote Control Building Set for Kids, RC Tank Sleigh Tracked Racer Rechargeable Technic Robotic Toy Birthday Gift for Boys Girls Ages 6-12
features: 5-in-1 Robot Building Toy - HiWEEGO technic building toy includes 5 awesome models: racing tank, tech robot, stunt vehicle, tracked car, and sledge. This building set not only sparks children's imagination but also gives them a sense of accomplishment as they solve problems, making learning positive, fun, and challenging.(One model can be built at a time.)

Color LED Light & Rechargeable Battery - This technic robot building kit is equipped with a dynamic LED lighting system. When the robot moves, the light glows and alternates between blue, green, and purple lights, creating a cool light show. The robot uses a 300mAh rechargeable lithium battery that provides up to 20 minutes of battery life, eliminating the need for frequent battery changes and allowing boys and girls to enjoy uninterrupted creative play and an immersive lighting experience

Exclusive High-Power Motor & All-Terrain Grip - Unlike ordinary vehicle building toy, this rc tank set is powered by a 7.4V high-speed motor, delivering up to 680 RPM and 2.5 KGf.cm torque—nearly double the power of standard 3.7V motors. The anti-slip track system provides exceptional grip. This means greater speed, increased power, and more stable performance, whether racing on smooth surfaces, galloping on carpets, or traversing rugged terrain

Dual Control, Diverse Gameplay - This vehicle technic set supports dual control modes via a free downloadable app and a 2.4GHz remote control, with an effective control range of up to 50 meters, making it flexible and convenient to use. Kids can freely switch between four fun modes—path mode, gyro mode, driving mode, and programming mode—to stimulate logical thinking and creativity through exploration and challenges, while enjoying the endless fun that technology brings

Educational and Entertaining Gift: Looking for the perfect gift for your kids? This 5-in-1 robot kit contains 604 high-quality ABS building bricks that can be flexibly combined into multiple modes. This RC robot building kit encourages parent-child interaction and teamwork, making it an ideal gift for boys and girls aged 6-12+, perfect for birthdays, Christmas, Children's Day, New Year, and other festive occasions. Even when not in use, it can serve as a decorative piece for a child's room or desk
description: Product Description 5-in-1 Remote Control Robot Building Set With just one set of blocks, you can build 5 completely different dynamic models. Kids can enjoy the fun of building and controlling a variety of shapes, fully unleashing their creative potential and imagination. 5 Models, Dynamic Light Show As the technic building set moves forward, its lights shift in a dazzling dance of blue, purple, and green—bringing a futuristic vibe that instantly captures attention.
